meta.title: Diablo Huma — Digital Archive
meta.description: A documentary site about the Diablo Huma, ceremonial dancer of the Inti Raymi in Ecuador.

home.title: Diablo Huma
home.subtitle: Digital Archive
home.description: A journey through the figure of the Diablo Huma: his history, his communities, and the symbolic universe he carries in every dance.

conocimiento.title: Knowledge
conocimiento.subtitle: History, symbol and ritual
conocimiento.description: The Diablo Huma is not the devil of Catholicism. He is the spirit of the wind, the guardian of the mountains, the energy that descends during the Inti Raymi to announce abundance.

territorio.title: Territory
territorio.subtitle: Communities and their geography
territorio.description: From Cotacachi to Chimborazo, the Diablo Huma appears during the June solstice celebrations. Each community holds its own way of dressing and dancing him.

archivo.title: Living Archive
archivo.subtitle: Photography, audio and testimony
archivo.description: A growing archive: images, recordings, accounts from mayorales and dancers. Memory is not frozen — it is tended.
